specializations: Specialty fumed silica for encapsulation support
Nanoparticle systems for active ingredient delivery
CAB-O-SIL® fumed silica as flow aid and delivery matrix
Aerogel particles for active encapsulation and release
product_highlights: CAB-O-SIL® TS-530 — hydrophobic fumed silica for flow aid and encapsulated powder carrier
CAB-O-SIL® M-5 — hydrophilic fumed silica for active stabilization in dry delivery systems
ENOVA® Aerogel — ultra-low density aerogel particles for active encapsulation and slow release
CAB-O-SPERSE® aqueous dispersions — pre-dispersed silica for liquid delivery systems
notes: Cabot Corporation is a global specialty chemicals and performance materials company with a notable personal care ingredient portfolio centered on fumed silica and aerogel technologies. Their CAB-O-SIL® fumed silica grades serve as critical excipients in encapsulated powder delivery systems, providing flow aid properties that enable uniform active distribution in dry formats. ENOVA® Aerogel particles represent an innovative delivery substrate for slow-release of oil-soluble actives with exceptional sensory properties, making Cabot a unique SKIN-TWIN reference for texture-active delivery integration.
